utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 5 items: health_coverage, property_coverage, travel_coverage, additional_services, total_budget. In the final coverage plan: health_coverage is present with description, monthly_cost, and details (costs included) → fully specified. property_coverage is null → not included. travel_coverage is present with description and monthly_cost but lacks detailed costs breakdown beyond a single monthly figure; still counts as with costs. additional_services is present but only a list of services without associated costs → not fully specified. total_budget is present with monthly and annual amounts → fully specified.

llm_ratings_evaluation.REASONING: The final coverage plan includes three named items: PrimeCare Premium Plan (physical health), EliteCare Premium Plan (mental health), and EliteTravel Premium Plan. I matched each to the corresponding entries in the ground-truth ratings under primary_health_coverage (physical_health and mental_health) and mobility_coverage (travel_insurance). Then I extracted their exact ratings.
